description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent, colorful marquee at the top displaying the title 'ASTYANAX' in bold letters. The front face includes a large display screen, control panel with multiple buttons and joysticks, and a coin slot below the controls. The side panels are adorned with vibrant, comic-style artwork depicting a fantasy scene with a warrior and mythical creatures, rendered in shades of red, purple, blue, and orange. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood with a faux woodgrain finish on the front, and the control panel is accented with colored buttons and joysticks. The screen is set within a black bezel, and the overall structure is boxy with a slightly angled upper section for the display and marquee. The back panel is plain and unadorned, painted in a solid red color.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with a colorful fantasy-themed marquee, vibrant side artwork, and a woodgrain front featuring a screen, control panel, and coin slot.
description_view_0: Side view showing detailed fantasy artwork with a warrior and creatures, and the angled marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'ASTYANAX' marquee, large screen, control panel with buttons and joysticks, and a coin slot below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the fantasy artwork and the cabinet's angled profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid red back panel with no visible features or artwork.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a black bezel surrounding the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of colored buttons and joysticks arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay, with a dark panel and colored button scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'ASTYANAX' title in bold yellow and red letters with fantasy-themed artwork including a warrior and mythical elements, set against a vibrant background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Vivid, comic-style fantasy artwork depicting a warrior and mythical creatures in red, purple, blue, and orange hues.
